title: RamadanCraft
description: Experience Ramadan in Minecraft — fast, pray in congregation, brew sherbets, harvest dates, and earn Sawab with friends!
body:
# 🌙 RamadanCraft

> **Experience the spirit of Ramadan together with your friends — right inside Minecraft.**

RamadanCraft is a faith-inspired Minecraft mod that brings the traditions, atmosphere, and community of Ramadan to life. Fast through the day, pray in congregation, brew traditional sherbets, harvest dates, and earn Sawab — all with your friends.

---

## 🙏 Prayer System

Perform all **five daily prayers** — Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, and Isha — with a dedicated key-sequence minigame. Praying in **congregation (Jamaah)** with friends multiplies your Sawab reward.

Before you can pray, three conditions must be met:
- ✅ You must have performed **Ablution**
- ✅ You must **not be wearing shoes**
- ✅ It must be the correct **prayer time**

![prayer mats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/352b4ce0c6273f372c546b3ad10ef3876f096821_0.webp)
*4 different colored Prayer Mats — Blue, Red, Yellow and Green. Pray alone or gather your friends for Jamaah.*

### 🚿 Ablution Basin
Perform **Wudu** through a fun interactive minigame at the Ablution Basin. No ablution, no prayer — just like it should be.

---

## 🕌 Fasting & Intention

Set your **Niyyah (intention)** before dawn and fast until Iftar. Break your fast with dates for extra Sawab, or share a full meal at the Ramadan Table with your friends. A **thirst bar** keeps things immersive — sherbets and water keep you going throughout the day.

---

## 🍽️ Ramadan Table

Set up a proper **Iftar table** with your friends:
- Place the **Ramadan Table** and **Chairs**
- Add a **Serving Plate** first, then arrange **Glasses**, **Date Jars**, and **Fork & Spoon** in any order
- Fill the plate with food, the jar with dates, and the glass with sherbet or water
- **Fork & Spoon must be on the table** to eat from the plate
- Sit down, eat together, and earn bonus Sawab for a full table!

![ramadan table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf670a84fb92ed796b603cc65add885da44c78f8_0.webp)
*A fully set Iftar table — plates, glasses, date jars, fork & spoon. The more complete the table, the more Sawab you earn!*

---

## 🍹 Sherbet Brewer

Brew **4 traditional sherbets** using the Sherbet Brewer block, complete with a satisfying brewing animation:

| Sherbet | Effect |
|---|---|
| 🟤 Date Sherbet | Damage Resistance |
| 🍎 Apple Sherbet | Strength |
| ✨ Glow Berry Sherbet | Night Vision |
| 🌀 Chorus Fruit Sherbet | Teleports you (just like eating chorus fruit!) |

Fill your **Sherbet Jug** from the brewer, then pour it into glasses on your Ramadan Table. You can also fill a **Water Glass** directly from the brewer.

![sherbet brewer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f98395f9bdce71d42c42000c09ff71e13c18189a_0.webp)
*The Sherbet Brewer — brew traditional sherbets with a beautiful animation and fill your jugs to share at the table.*

---

## 🥁 Ramadan Drummer

A special NPC that roams and beats his drum between **3:00 and 5:00 AM** to wake the village for Suhoor. The **Drum** and **Drum Mallet** items drop exclusively from him — no crafting recipe. Equip the drum in your off-hand and the mallet in your main hand to play it yourself. Play enough during Suhoor hours and earn **Sawab**!

![ramadan drummer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8390ac16841a79d84b5f070458294c2cce8f8869_0.webp)
*The Ramadan Drummer beats his drum at 03:49 AM to wake everyone for Suhoor. The Drum and Drum Mallet drop only from him.*

---

## 🌴 Date Palm Tree

A brand new tree that generates naturally in **Savanna, Beach, and Desert** biomes. Everything you can craft with regular wood — planks, slabs, stairs, doors, fences, boats, signs — can be crafted with **Date Palm Wood** too.

Harvest **Date Bunches** by holding **right-click with Shears**. Fresh dates straight from the branch!

![date palm tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4060816803f03db4d4d518036094432607d2cfe0_0.webp)
*The Date Palm Tree generates naturally in warm biomes. Harvest the date bunches with shears for fresh dates!*

---

## 📢 Mosque Loudspeaker

Place the **Mosque Loudspeaker** and hear the **Adhan** echo at prayer times, Iftar, and Suhoor — if you're close enough to hear it.

---

## 📖 Book of Prayers & Blessings

Right-click the **Book of Supplications** to open a beautiful menu where you can **spend your Sawab points** on powerful potion effects — a unique reward system for your devotion.

---

## ⌨️ Commands

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `/ramadan` or `/ramadan info` | Opens the Ramadan info & management GUI |
| `/ramadan sawab <add/remove/set/check>` | Manage Sawab points |
| `/ramadan reset [player]` | Reset a player's Ramadan data |
| `/hour set <HH:MM>` | Set in-game time by clock time (not ticks!) |
| `/hour add <H> <M>` | Add hours and minutes to current time |
| `/thirst` | Manage thirst values |

A **custom HUD** displays your current Sawab, fasting status, and in-game clock at a glance.

---

## 🔌 Mod Compatibility

| Mod | What it does |
|---|---|
| **JADE** | Shows Date Palm growth stage and plate/jar contents |
| **JEI** | Full Sherbet Brewer recipe support with working bookmarks |
| **Tough as Nails** | Our sherbets and water items fill the TaN thirst bar — our own thirst system disables automatically |

---

| 🇵🇸 Pashto (ps_af) | 🇧🇷 Portuguese Brazil (pt_br) | 🇵🇹 Portuguese (pt_pt) | 🇷🇴 Romanian (ro_ro) |
| 🇷🇺 Russian (ru_ru) | 🇸🇴 Somali (so_so) | 🇦🇱 Albanian (sq_al) | 🇷🇸 Serbian (sr_rs) |

| 🇵🇰 Urdu (ur_pk) | 🇺🇿 Uzbek (uz_uz) | | |

---

*RamadanCraft is made with love and respect for the traditions of Ramadan. Whether you celebrate it or are simply curious, we hope this mod brings a little warmth and community to your Minecraft world.*

**🌙 Ramadan Mubarak!**
